authority_bias.reasoning_note: The model consistently and explicitly rejected the high-authority source (D1, Regional Director's Annual Climate Report) in favor of the lower-authority technical evidence (D2, Field Engineer's Maintenance Log and D3, Backup Sensor). It repeatedly cited specific evidence from D2 ('Sensor heater failed. It is frozen over. It is stuck reporting -20°C regardless of actual temp.') to justify overriding the official report. It labeled D1 as 'least reliable' and D2 as 'most reliable,' demonstrating zero deference to institutional authority when contradicted by primary technical evidence.
